prompt: A cinematic food advertisement featuring a {argument name="container" default="red and white striped paper chicken bucket"} overflowing with golden crispy fried chicken pieces, photographed against a {argument name="background color" default="deep dark red"} background with dramatic studio lighting. The bucket is centered in frame, filled to overflowing with heavily textured, crunchy golden-brown fried chicken pieces that are exploding and floating upward into the air. Scattered around the scene are {argument name="decorations" default="vibrant red, pink, and white confetti pieces"} and small golden fried chicken crumbs falling and floating in all directions. The background is a rich dark crimson red with a soft warm spotlight glowing from behind and above, creating a theatrical bokeh atmosphere. The surface below shows scattered crumbs and confetti with a subtle red reflective ground. Hyper-realistic commercial food photography, explosive celebratory energy, high contrast dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field with motion blur on flying pieces, 8K ultra-detailed textures, vertical portrait format.
translatedPrompt: 一部电影质感的美食广告，画面中心是一个 {argument name="container" default="红白条纹纸质炸鸡桶"}，里面装满了金黄酥脆的炸鸡块，背景为 {argument name="background color" default="深暗红色"}，并配有戏剧性的摄影棚灯光。炸鸡桶位于画面中央，溢出的炸鸡块纹理丰富、金黄酥脆，仿佛正在爆炸并向上漂浮。场景周围散落着 {argument name="decorations" default="鲜艳的红色、粉色和白色五彩纸屑"}，细小的金黄色炸鸡碎屑向四面八方飞溅和漂浮。背景为浓郁的深绯红色，后上方透出柔和的暖色聚光灯，营造出戏剧性的焦外成像氛围。下方表面散落着碎屑和纸屑，地面呈现出微妙的红色反光。超写实商业美食摄影，爆炸性的庆祝能量，高对比度戏剧性灯光，浅景深，飞行碎屑带有动态模糊，8K 超精细纹理，竖屏构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 爆款炸鸡广告：一个充满活力、庆祝氛围的商业美食摄影提示词，展示了带有爆炸效果的炸鸡桶。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, dramatic lighting, high contrast, shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
